# Architecture Decision Record (ADR) Template

## ADR-XXXX: Decision Title

## Status
- Proposed | Accepted | Superseded | Rejected

## Date
- YYYY-MM-DD

## Context
Describe the technical and business context that requires this decision.

## Decision
Describe the chosen approach clearly and concretely.

## Rationale
Explain why this option was selected over alternatives.

## Alternatives Considered
1. Option A
2. Option B
3. Option C

## Consequences
- Positive impacts
- Negative impacts
- Operational impacts

## Follow-Up Actions
- Action 1
- Action 2
